basic_details.job_title: ISRO LPSC Scientist/ Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Liquid Propulsion Systems Centre (LPSC), Vikram Sarabhai Space Centre (VSSC) Campus, Valiamala, Thiruvananthapuram, under Indian Space Research Organisation (ISRO), Department of Space, Govt. of India has released detailed advertisement (LPSC01/2026) for Scientist/Engineer ‘SC’ posts. Download the official detailed notification from LPSC website to check vacancies, essential requirements, age limit, pay scale & application process before applying.

application_fee.details: Application fee details (if any) will be mentioned on the online application portal. Payment through online mode only.

qualification.details: Nationality: Indian Citizen. Essential Educational Qualification: BE/B.Tech or ME/M.Tech in relevant disciplines with minimum 65% marks (average of all semesters) or CGPA 6.84 on 10 point scale (AME/Grade IETE candidates should have minimum 65% marks or CGPA 6.84 in Section B alone). ME/M.Tech candidates should have minimum 60% marks or CGPA 6.5 on 10 point scale. | Age Limit (as on 12.05.2026): 30 years (relaxable for SC/ST/OBC/PwBD/Ex-Servicemen as per rules).

vacancy_details.Discipline / Essential Requirements: BE/B.Tech in Mechanical/Production Engg. / ME/M.Tech in Welding Technology / Metallurgical Welding and Steel Metal Engg.
BE/B.Tech in Mechanical Engg. / ME/M.Tech in Turbo Machinery / Internal Combustion Engines and Turbo Machinery / Internal Machinery Engg.

BE/B.Tech in Electronics & Communication / Applied Electronics Engg. / ME/M.Tech in Power Electronics / Power Electronics and Control / Power Control and Drives / Advanced Electrical Power System / Electrical and Electronics (Power Systems) / High Voltage and Power Systems Engg. / Industrial Power Control and drives.

BE/B.Tech in Electronics & Communication / Electronics & Instrumentation Engg. / Applied Electronics Engg. / ME/M.Tech in RF and Microwave Engg. / Microwave and Optical Engg. / Microwave Engg. / Microwaves.
BE/B.Tech in Metallurgy Engg. / Metallurgical and Materials Engg. / Metallurgy and Material Technology / Metallurgical Engg. / Material Science & Technology.

category_wise_vacancy.Discipline / Essential Requirements: BE/B.Tech in Metallurgy Engg. / Metallurgical and Materials Engg. / Metallurgy and Material Technology / Metallurgical Engg. / Material Science & Technology.

salary_details.details: Pay Level 10 (Pay Matrix: ₹56,100 – ₹1,77,500/-). Additional allowances as per ISRO/Department of Space rules (DA, HRA, Transport Allowance, Medical facilities, etc.).

selection_process: Written Test followed by Interview (as per ISRO norms for Scientist/Engineer ‘SC’ posts). Final selection based on performance in written test and interview. Document Verification of educational qualifications
how_to_apply: Apply online only through the official LPSC / ISRO recruitment portal.
Fill the application form carefully and submit before the last date.
Interested candidates may visit the website www.lpsc.gov.in for detailed information and online application form.
Click Here to Apply Online for LPSC Scientist/Engineer 2026
important_instructions: Read the detailed advertisement carefully before applying. Ensure eligibility (qualification, marks, and age as on 12.05.2026). Applications received only through online mode will be considered. Keep email and mobile number active for all future communications. Canvassing in any form will disqualify the candidate. The Centre reserves the right to cancel / modify the recruitment process.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for LPSC Scientist/Engineer Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for LPSC Recruitment 2026 is 12 May 2026 (1400 hrs). Candidates must complete the application before the deadline. Late submissions will not be accepted.

faq.question: Q2. What is the qualification required for LPSC Scientist/Engineer 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a BE/B.Tech or ME/M.Tech in relevant engineering disciplines. A minimum of 65% marks or required CGPA is necessary. Postgraduate candidates must meet separate minimum criteria.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for LPSC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit is 30 years as on 12 May 2026. For some posts, the upper age limit is extendable up to 35 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available in LPSC Scientist/Engineer 2026?
faq.answer: 6 vacancies have been announced across different engineering disciplines. The exact number of posts is mentioned post-wise in the notification. Candidates should refer to the official advertisement for details.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for LPSC Scientist/Engineer Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a written test followed by an interview. Candidates must qualify both stages to be considered for final selection. Final merit is based on overall performance.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary for LPSC Scientist/Engineer ‘SC’ posts?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive Pay Level 10 salary ranging from ₹56,100 to ₹1,77,500. Additional allowances like DA, HRA, and transport benefits are provided. Other facilities are available as per ISRO rules.

faq.question: Q7. How can I apply for LPSC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must apply online through the official LPSC or ISRO website. They need to fill in the application form and submit it before the deadline. Only online applications will be accepted.
